<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const priceEl = document.querySelector(".price-item.price-item--regular");
  if (priceEl) {
    const originalText = priceEl.textContent.trim();
    const match = originalText.match(/([\d.,]+)\s*(\D+)/);

    if (match) {
      const priceValue = parseFloat(match[1].replace(",", "."));
      const currency = match[2].trim();

      if (!isNaN(priceValue)) {
        const doubledPrice = (priceValue * 2).toFixed(2).replace(".", ",");
        const strikeEl = document.createElement("span");
        strikeEl.style.textDecoration = "line-through";
        strikeEl.style.marginLeft = "8px";
        strikeEl.textContent = `${doubledPrice} ${currency}`;

        priceEl.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", strikeEl);
      }
    }
  }
});
</script>

  • Beyond Pregnancy: Converts to the perfect breastfeeding pillow and is great for supporting tummy time

<style>
@media (max-width: 767px){
  .sticky-atc{
    position: fixed;
    left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    display: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: var(--color-background, #fff);
    padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
  }
  .sticky-atc .sticky-atc__btn{
    width: 98% !important;
    min-height: 56px !important;
    font-size: 18px !important;
    border-radius: 6px; !important;
    background-color: #f8adbe !important;
    border-color: #ff86a1 !important;
    margin: 4px;
    color: #fff !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
  }
  body.has-sticky-atc{
    padding-bottom: calc(var(--sticky-atc-h, 56px) + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
  }
}
</style>

<script>
(function(){
  var mq = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 767px)');
  var SEL_BTN = 'form[action*="/cart/add"] .product-form__submit, button[name="add"].product-form__submit';
  var stickyWrap, stickyBtn, origBtn, origForm, io, mo;

  function getOrig(){
    var b = document.querySelector(SEL_BTN);
    if (!b) return null;
    origForm = b.closest('form');
    return b;
  }

  function ensureSticky(){
    if (stickyWrap) return;
    stickyWrap = document.createElement('div');
    stickyWrap.className = 'sticky-atc';
    stickyBtn = document.createElement('button');
    stickyBtn.type = 'button';
    stickyBtn.className = 'product-form__submit sticky-atc__btn';
    stickyWrap.appendChild(stickyBtn);
    document.body.appendChild(stickyWrap);
  }

  function syncClone(){
    if (!origBtn || !stickyBtn) return;
    stickyBtn.disabled = !!origBtn.disabled;
    stickyBtn.innerHTML = origBtn.innerHTML;
  }

  function showSticky(show){
    if (!stickyWrap) return;
    stickyWrap.style.display = show ? 'block' : 'none';
    document.body.classList.toggle('has-sticky-atc', !!show);
    if (show){
      requestAnimationFrame(function(){
        document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--sticky-atc-h', stickyWrap.offsetHeight + 'px');
      });
    }
  }

  function onClickClone(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!origBtn || !origForm || origBtn.disabled) return;
    // Викликаємо нативний клік по оригінальній кнопці
    origBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true }));
  }

  function observeVisibility(){
    if (io) { io.disconnect(); io = null; }
    if (!origBtn) { showSticky(false); return; }
    io = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      var entry = entries[0];
      var visible = entry && entry.isIntersecting && entry.intersectionRatio > 0;
      showSticky(!visible && mq.matches);
    }, { threshold: [0, 0.01, 1] });
    io.observe(origBtn);
  }

  function observeMutations(){
    if (mo) { mo.disconnect(); mo = null; }
    if (!origBtn) return;
    mo = new MutationObserver(syncClone);
    mo.observe(origBtn, { attributes:true, childList:true, characterData:true, subtree:true });
  }

  function mount(){
    if (!mq.matches) { teardown(); return; }
    origBtn = getOrig();
    if (!origBtn) { teardown(); return; }
    ensureSticky();
    syncClone();
    observeVisibility();
    observeMutations();
    stickyBtn.removeEventListener('click', onClickClone);
    stickyBtn.addEventListener('click', onClickClone, { passive:false });
  }

  function teardown(){
    showSticky(false);
    if (io) { io.disconnect(); io = null; }
    if (mo) { mo.disconnect(); mo = null; }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', mount);
  else mount();

  var pageMO = new MutationObserver(function(){
    var current = document.querySelector(SEL_BTN);
    if (current !== origBtn) mount();
  });
  pageMO.observe(document.body, { childList:true, subtree:true });

  if (mq.addEventListener) mq.addEventListener('change', mount);
  else mq.addListener(mount);

  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){
    if (document.body.classList.contains('has-sticky-atc')) {
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--sticky-atc-h', stickyWrap.offsetHeight + 'px');
    }
  }, { passive:true });
})();
</script>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      const variants = document.querySelector(".ft-qb__item-variants");
      if (variants) {
        variants.remove();
        clearInterval(interval);
      }
    }, 300);
  });
</script>

custom_css: .button--full-width {background-color: #f8adbe; min-height: 56px; font-size: 18px; border-color: #f8adbe; color: #fff; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;}

settings.heading: Comfortable side sleep in every trimester

settings.text: The Lunara Light 3-in-1 pregnancy pillow makes side sleeping easier in every trimester. One ergonomic cushion supports your bump, back and knees, easing pressure in your lower back and hips. The soft cotton cover is gentle enough for nightly use throughout pregnancy.

settings.heading: Flexible maternity support that adapts to your body

settings.text: This maternity pillow adapts to each stage and position. You can hug it like a body pillow, placing it between your knees or under your bump. Later you curve it along your back for support. The balanced filling stays supportive from pregnancy into postpartum.

settings.heading: From pregnancy pillow to nursing and recovery essential

settings.text: After birth, the Lunara Light pregnancy pillow becomes a practical nursing and recovery pillow. Place it around your waist or at your side to bring your baby closer and ease strain on arms and shoulders. The removable cotton cover is machine-washable for everyday freshness.
